posts.author: KatieJ (Katie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi - I’m trying to use Monday to replicate our Risk Register - Ive got the formula working correctly - but the Status (which is set up to be the Risk RAG rating - Green - Low, Orange - Medium etc) can’t be updated based on the formula output - I can see lots of discussions about this but cant find the answer - is this possible now?

What are you trying to achieve

When the formula column outputs the risk score (eg. 1 - low) the status column automatically changes to Low (green)
